commands.review_summary:
The PR releases the embedded attempt session lock for manual aborts via a new abort helper and also canonicalizes persisted device-auth token records during infra parsing.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +44. Total +65 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main releases the retained session lock only for timeout aborts, so a non-timeout manual abort skips that release path. I did not run a live stop-and-retry reproduction because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The protected maintainer label, open sibling fix, missing real behavior proof, and credential-parser side change require maintainer landing selection rather than automated repair.

target.title: fix(agents): release session lock on manual abort
target.body:
## Summary
- Fixes #88600 by releasing the retained embedded-attempt session lock for manual aborts, not only timeout aborts.
- Keeps timeout abandonment handling separate while sharing the lock-release/warn path.
- Adds focused coverage for manual abort lock release and non-throwing release failures.
- Normalizes parsed device-auth tokens through the existing canonicalizer to unblock current main's prod/type CI failure.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-abort.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.subscription-cleanup.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-abort.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.subscription-cleanup.test.ts src/infra/device-auth-store.test.ts src/shared/device-auth-store.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-abort.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-abort.test.ts src/infra/device-auth-store.ts src/shared/device-auth-store.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Manual user abort now schedules retained session-lock release through the same abort lock-release path timeout aborts use.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on Node/Vitest wrapper.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-abort.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.subscription-cleanup.test.ts src/infra/device-auth-store.test.ts src/shared/device-auth-store.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: Focused test verifies manual abort calls `releaseHeldLockForAbort`; existing controller and cleanup tests verify release idempotency, drain coordination, and cleanup release behavior. Device-auth parser now passes core typechecking by canonicalizing raw persisted token records.
Observed result after fix: 5 test files passed across 3 Vitest shards; `pnpm tsgo:core` passed.
What was not tested: Full live provider stop/retry flow; this patch is covered at the abort-lock wiring and controller contract level.
target.author: steipete
